name: Aspen Saturday Market

Products.value: Only Colorado made, grown and produced items (no brokers): produce, fruits, vegetables, bread, meats, jams, artisan products, sculptures, paintings, plus a food court and petting zoo

Address.value: Downtown Aspen: between S. Hunter St, E. Hopkins Ave & E. Hyman Ave, Aspen, CO 81611

notes: The market is run by the City of Aspen (Special Events dept), not the Aspen Chamber (aspenchamber.org just has a promotional listing page and is not the operator). Two official City of Aspen sources used: aspen.gov/180/Aspen-Saturday-Market (main info page) and aspenspecialevents.com/events/saturday-market (Special Events dept event page with vendor/contact details). Phone (970) 429-2093 is the Special Events department line listed as the contact for the market, not a market-specific direct line. Facebook and Instagram accounts were located via search and match the market's official handle/name but were not independently verified by fetching their content. SNAP/EBT acceptance, ADA accessibility, and certified-organic certification status were not clearly stated on any official source, so they were omitted. Known address (E. Hopkins & S. Hunter Streets) is consistent with and slightly refined by the official location description.
